documentation.file_docstring: Fetch an image from a URL and upload it to Tlon storage. Returns the uploaded URL, or falls back to the original URL on error. Note: configureClient must be called before using this function.
inline_comments: Validate URL is http/https before fetching
Fetch the image with SSRF protection
Use fetchWithSsrFGuard directly (not urbitFetch) to preserve the full URL path
Extract filename from URL or use a default

functions.name: uploadImageFromUrl
